details.reasoning: Complete implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) New provider package at packages/pixelart/ with properly configured package.json; (2) createPixelArt factory function exported from index.ts; (3) PixelArtProvider interface with image() and imageModel() methods; (4) PixelArtImageModel class implementing ImageModelV3 with doGenerate() method; (5) Image settings schema supporting size, style enum ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity (1-4); (6) Base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'; (7) Package structure follows existing AI SDK providers with proper TypeScript configs, build setup (tsup, turbo), test configs (vitest.node, vitest.edge), and dependencies; (8) Only new files created under packages/pixelart/, no modifications to existing packages. Comprehensive test coverage included for both provider and image model functionality.
